incident_details.short_description: Slow loading time for 'Active Accounts' view
incident_details.description: Users reporting that the main Account grid takes over 15 seconds to load, causing significant productivity loss.

technical_context.telemetry_data: Slow query detected on filtered view with 5 nested joins.

resolution.root_cause: The 'Active Accounts' view was configured with too many columns from related entities (FetchXML was too complex), and several columns lacked indexes.
resolution_steps: 1. Used the Dynamics 365 Performance Tool to analyze the FetchXML query.
2. Removed three unnecessary lookup columns from the default view.
3. Created a custom index on the 'Account Type' and 'Region' fields to speed up filtering.
4. Published all customizations and verified load time dropped to < 3 seconds.
